attempt: Transfer TICKET55's rule: if the strongest remaining family crosses a finite gate, prove whether that gate forces it into a known terminal no-go family before searching a larger sample.

bounded_result.candidate_theorem: If a strongest exact-gap selector family crosses a finite gate, prove it tunnels into a known leakage/no-go family or produce a replayable gap-2 witness.
bounded_result.frontier_rule: A gate-crosser should be promoted only if it avoids every known terminal no-go tunnel.

obstruction: This transfer is methodological. It does not solve the target problem; it turns a gate crossing into a terminal/no-go theorem obligation before treating it as a counterexample candidate.
candidate_theorem: If a strongest exact-gap selector family crosses a finite gate, prove it tunnels into a known leakage/no-go family or produce a replayable gap-2 witness.
next_experiment: Prove the problem-specific gate-to-terminal tunnel or exhibit a gate-crosser that avoids all known no-go tunnels.
claim_boundary: No twin prime proof and no certified twin prime counterexample.
